channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: 12 inch pothole getting bigger, 15th March
item.description:
This started off as a small pothole, it has now increased in size and is getting deeper, the stones in the hole are now flying out when a car or van hits it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rippersley Road, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on front of gp surgery, 15th March
item.description:
Graffiti on front of gp surgery

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 205, Walworth Road, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bags of rubbish dumped since Friday 13th March 26, 15th March
item.description:
Once rubbish is dumped then others continue to dump more rubbish

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Conway Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish on pathway on Cazenove Road, 15th March
item.description:
Rubbish is always left by this lamp post outside 5 Cazenove Road. The bags are not tied and random furniture is left here too. The rubbish is left here by residents outside of the official dumping times. Attracts pests and also the pathway is very narrow.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cazenove Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: By planter on pedestrianised jjnctikn, 15th March
item.description:
Fly tip

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Priory Park Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Please clean up, 15th March
item.description:
Foxes drag trash all around, please clean up up the bin area

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Victoria Park Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping Robertson Street, 15th March
item.description:
Please clear

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Robertson Street, Clapham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped metal household waste, 15th March
item.description:
This area is a dumping group for bad actors in the neighbourhood. This has been an ongoing problem for years. This waste has been there over a week and please can it be removed. Can cameras also be installed in the area to prevent these persistent issues.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 157, Leesons Hill, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hedge blocking 90% of the pavement, 15th March
item.description:
Reported this three times but gets closed without fixing! The hedge is blocking nearly all of the pavement. You can’t get pushchairs through. Trim the hedge please!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mcleod Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Passover dumping, 15th March
item.description:
There has been a mass dumping of household items again ! As it’s Passover. Households clear out unwanted things. Please could you enforce this behaviour and tell the community to go to the recycling centre. This is such a disrespectful action !

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Durley Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car., 15th March
item.description:
We have had a yellow.car park on the street for 6 months without moving its has 2 flat tyres and also a tow bar attached to the front

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Honeyden Road, North Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumping between Almond Close and Birch Close, 15th March
item.description:
Please can the dumped items around the bins here be removed swiftly - and 'no dumping' signs put up?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 11, Almond Close, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Half chair usual spot Vicarage Grove, 15th March
item.description:
5 days

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Vicarage Grove, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti along walls behind bins, 15th March
item.description:
Please can all of the public facing walls along Bournemouth Close have the significant graffiti along them removed?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 167-169, Rye Lane, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumping next to bins, 15th March
item.description:
Please can all the rubbish and debris be removed swiftly?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 167-169, Rye Lane, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Linthorpe Road N16 Hackney needs cleaning, 15th March
item.description:
Dumped rubbish also litter everywhere, needs cleaning round trees bases probably. Gullies need to be cleaned.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Linthorpe Road, Hackney, London

item.title: Street light - column STILL missing!, 15th March
item.description:
54 P 31 This has been missing for months now Why?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Perry Street, Chislehurst, Greater London
